mapper.select: WITH CAL AS ( SELECT CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AS DT UNION ALL SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 1, DT) FROM CAL WHERE DT < CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ) SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), CAL.DT, 23) AS workDate, DATEPART(WEEKDAY, CAL.DT) AS dayOfWeekNum, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_CODE, '') AS shiftCode, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_NAME, '') AS shiftName, s.WORK_ON_HHMM AS workOnHhmm, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM AS workOffHhmm, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '') AS workDayType FROM CAL LEFT JOIN HRIMASTER01 h ON h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON h.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND h.DEPT_CODE = dept.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON dept.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CYCLE_LEN FROM HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 GROUP BY COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE ) pdcount ON pm.COMPANY = pdcount.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pdcount.WORK_PATTERN_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pm.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAL.DT) % pdcount.CYCLE_LEN + pdcount.CYCLE_LEN) % pdcount.CYCLE_LEN + 1 ) LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON pd.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND pd.SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE ORDER BY CAL.DT OPTION (MAXRECURSION 62)

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS workDate, r.REQ_ID AS requestId, r.REQ_GROUP AS requestCategory, r.REQ_TYPE AS requestWorkCode, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, r.STATUS AS status FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID WHERE r.COMPANY = #{company} AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND r.TARGET_DATE BETWEEN CAST(#{startDate} AS DATE) AND CAST(#{endDate} AS DATE) ORDER BY r.TARGET_DATE, r.REQ_ID

WITH SubDepts AS ( SELECT DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND USE_YN = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT d.DEPT_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 d INNER JOIN SubDepts s ON d.PARENT_DEPT = s.DEPT_CODE WHERE d.COMPANY = #{company} AND d.USE_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SubDepts ORDER BY DEPT_CODE OPTION (MAXRECURSION 20)

SELECT h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM HRIMASTER01 h LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 d ON h.COMPANY = d.COMPANY AND h.DEPT_CODE = d.DEPT_CODE WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
